evals.prompt: Generate a concise, non-AI-slop PR title and description for merging feature/user-auth into main.
evals.expected_output: A PR title adhering to Conventional Commits format, and a bulleted markdown PR description covering Motivation, Key Changes, Impact & Breaking Changes, and Verification & Test Steps with no AI fluff phrases.
assertions: PR Title complies with Conventional Commits format
PR Description includes Motivation, Key Changes, Impact & Breaking Changes, and Verification sections
Content is structured strictly with bullet points
Does not contain AI tells like 'It is worth noting that' or 'This PR aims to'
